seed_text: Every action admits of being outdone. Our life is an apprenticeship to the truth that around every circle another can be drawn
thematic_frame: Ralph Waldo Emerson — Over-Soul, Self-Reliance, Transcendentalism
aura_sensing:
* the smell of a puddle just after a storm; something rinsed clean.
* a snap on the line where you thought the world ended; an open, green jaw.
* breathing space between two notes; time here, all wrong.
dan_extract:
here, a thing that just opened up; a green jaw waiting to bite.
the sound of a break, right before everything goes wrong.
top_saccose_fingerprint: here-heal-here
